act: Canadian Institutes of Health Research Act
subject: Reappointment of a member of the Governing Council of the Canadian Institutes of Health Research
precis: Reappointment of Paul J. Allison of Saint-Lambert, Quebec, as a member of the Governing Council of the Canadian Institutes of Health Research, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.
